title: Local vs Cloud Execution
summary: Synthetic planning packet for a product decision on local reliability, hosted convenience, and demo risk.

sources.title: Reliability review
sources.excerpt: Local operation keeps the demo inspectable but makes dependency pinning and seed data more important.

sources.title: Go-to-market note
sources.excerpt: Hosted previews reduce onboarding friction, but the current roadmap has no production hosting plan.

sources.title: Security note
sources.excerpt: Public fixtures must avoid private planning paths, customer identifiers, and unreleased vendor data.
